assignments.direction: Investigate the application of genetic algorithms to the job scheduling problem, focusing on minimizing total tardiness
Explore the use of ant colony optimization for job scheduling, analyzing the impact of different pheromone update rules
Develop a simulated annealing approach for the job scheduling problem, examining the effects of various cooling schedules
Apply a constraint programming framework to the job scheduling problem, investigating the use of different constraint propagation techniques
Investigate the use of particle swarm optimization for job scheduling, analyzing the impact of different neighborhood topologies
